    The blog.

    Long-form writing on the aircraft we cover — sourced, dated, and honest about what nobody actually knows yet.

    Latest

    Posts

    Engineering · ETOPS · Widebody

    Why the four-engine airliner is extinct

    The 747, the A340 and the A380 were not beaten by a better aeroplane. They were beaten by a rule change, and by an engine that stopped breaking.

    14 July 2026 · 7 min read

    Read it →

    Supersonic · Boom · Concorde

    Is supersonic travel actually coming back?

    Boom Supersonic has flown a demonstrator, built a factory and taken 130 orders. It still has not run its engine. Here is where the comeback really stands in mid-2026 — and how Overture measures up against Concorde.

    14 July 2026 · 9 min read

    Read it →

    About the data. Every specification is compiled from manufacturer documents and cited per row. Operator fleet counts are approximate snapshots, marked ≈ and dated; individually verified figures carry a ✓. All silhouettes are original works of aircraft.fyi, drawn to true scale. Corrections and enquiries: business@luck.fyi — we fix errors visibly, not silently.
